title: Chronost Foods
description: Adds Food to the game with recipes from other mods.
body:
This mod simply adds pizza to the game using the dough from the create mod.  It also includes a few tools that can be used as weapons.  The textures are not the best and it does not have all the features made in the correct way but everything will be updated in the future.  If you would like to make textures for the mod then comment and I will get in contact with you.  Version 0.1 adds cheese pizza and pepperoni pizza and ingredients to craft them.  This mod was made for a modpack a standalone food might might come in the future https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/chronost-incorporated

 

credits:assiperc (chalice texture)

Curseforge version: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chronost-foods-fabric
